data.title: ERibulin in Advanced Solitary Fibrous Tumor, an ItaliaN Sarcoma Group Phase II Study (ERASING)
data.brief_summary: Phase II study on advanced Solitary Fibrous Tumor (SFT) treated with eribulin
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. The patient or legal representative must be able to read and understand the informed consent form and must have been willing to give written informed consent and any locally required authorization before any study-specific procedures, including screening evaluations, sampling
